message.content:
VERDICT: ACCEPT

BLOCKERS: none

REQUIRED_TESTS: none

RATIONALE: The repair correctly addresses all three blockers: malformed controller metadata is handled gracefully via validation and early return, post-claim crashes are reconciled through idempotent ledger claims and audit logging, and terminal spec status is durably written. Unknown execution targets are now rejected instead of falling back to sig_spot. Tests cover all critical paths including crash recovery, bookkeeping retries, and validation failures. The code satisfies the stated contracts and eliminates unsafe assumptions.
